calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. was present via ZoomGov, and is represented by Soheila Omrani, Esq. Witness, Benjamin Seeman is present via ZoomGov and is placed under oath and testified on behalf of the plaintiff.

No appearance by defendant Otto Trucking Inc.

Complaint for Money filed on February 20, 2025.
Proof of Service of Summons to defendant Otto Trucking Inc. by substitute service on April 18, 2025, and filed on May 14, 2025.
Request for Court Judgment by Default filed on October 14, 2025.
Dismissal of all Does filed on October 14, 2025.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against defendant Otto Trucking Inc, as follows:

Principal - $341,820.01.
Attorney Fees - $3,900.00.
Costs - $1,250.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $108,895.43.

Total - $455,865.44.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Judge: Honorable Victor M. Hwang; Clerk: C. Cheng; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Not Assigned. (502)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-04-2026 Continued To Feb-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 502

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
